headline: Dan Burn
body: 🚨 Dan Burn confirms Jordan Henderson suffered injury jumping over advertising hoardings during England celebrations following FIFAWorldCup last-16 victory over Mexico at Azteca Stadium. Newcastle United centre-back says severity unclear TheAthleticFC nytimes.com/athletic/live-bl…
